title: LEGO DUPLO | Disney Mickey & Minnie Birthday Train Toy for 2+ Year Old Girls & Boys - Educational Toys for Toddlers with Number Bricks & 3 Figures - Gift Idea - 10941
features: DISNEY BUILDING TOYS – Birthday fun aboard the Disney train with a 3–section buildable LEGO train toy for 2+ year old boys and girls, a birthday cake with a candle, and 5 stackable number bricks
TODDLER LEARNING TOYS – There are lots of developmental activities for kids to enjoy with Mickey Mouse, Minnie Mouse and Pluto figures aboard the buildable birthday train toy
FUN ACCESSORIES – This LEGO | Disney train set includes a guitar, flexible balloons, gifts and a fabric dress for the Minnie Mouse DUPLO figure
LEARNING VITAL SKILLS – With this educational toy, toddlers aged 2+ use fine motor skills to stack the number bricks, decorate the wagons and build social skills with Disney inspired role play
GIFT FOR TODDLERS – This 22-piece LEGO DUPLO building toy is a fun birthday gift for 2+ year old girls and boys who love train toys and building with colourful LEGO DUPLO bricks
LEARNING THROUGH PLAY – Includes simple building instructions so kids can develop confidence and share the creative fun with parents as they build their LEGO train toy
description: From the manufacturer Birthday fun aboard the Disney train! Celebrate a toddler’s birthday with a fun-filled, play-and-learn set featuring Disney’s Mickey Mouse, Minnie Mouse and Pluto. Kids learn to count with Disney characters Toddlers join Disney’s Mickey Mouse, Minnie Mouse and Pluto aboard the birthday train, stopping off to learn about numbers. LEGO DUPLO ǀ Disney Mickey & Minnie Birthday Train Developing emotional skills Kids role-play with Mickey Mouse, Minnie Mouse and Pluto. Improve fine motor skills Build and play with the 3-part train and 5 number bricks. Creative construction Serve up a buildable cake with a candle and accessories. Learning while building Kids develop fine motor skills as they construct the cake and grow their creativity by arranging the train however they like. A great gift for toddlers aged 2+ This colourful playset includes 3 Disney figures, a 3-part train, birthday cake, number bricks and accessories.
